title: Kidney Patients' Guide to 9 Soothing Herbal Creams for Dysuria
description: Vaccinium macrocarpon creams, also known as cranberry creams, have been used to help alleviate symptoms of dysuria, a painful or difficult urination. This is because the creams contain compounds like proanthocyanidins (PACs), which are found in the berries of the Vaccinium macrocarpon plant. PACs have been shown to prevent bacteria like E. coli from adhering to the bladder walls, reducing the risk of urinary tract infections (UTIs) that can cause dysuria.
